(1) These rules may be called the Cable Television Networks (Amendment) Rules, 2008. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In theCableTelevision Networks Rules, 1994, in rule?, in sub-rule (2), in clause (viii), for sub-clause (A), the following sub-clause shall be substituted, namely :вЂ” вЂњ(A) cigarettes, tobacco products, wine, alcohol, liquor or other intoxicants вЂќ, [F. No. 3105/14/2008-BC-II1] ZOHRA CHATTERJI, Jt. Secy; Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 729(E), dated the 29th September, 1994 and subsequently amended vide G.S.R. 459(E), dated 8th October, 1996, G.S.R. 710(E). dated 8th September, 2000, G.S.R. 282(E), dated 11th May, 2006, G.S.R. 452(E), dated 31 st July, 2006, G.S.R. 459(E), dated 3rd August, 2006 and G.S.R. 469(E), dated 9th August, 2006.
